quality_details.fix_applied: Fixed photoGallery.test.ts fake timer isolation - moved vi.useFakeTimers() and vi.setSystemTime() into beforeEach/afterEach hooks to ensure clean timer state per test, fixing date calculation edge cases

summary: All 2603 client tests and 232 server tests passing. Fixed test isolation issue in photoGallery.test.ts where fake timers were set at module level causing date calculation inconsistencies. Build passing.
